title: Dossier Document Model
description: The single JSON contract an agent fills to generate a Dossier. The rendered HTML is a projection of this object, which is embedded back into the output as the source-of-truth data island (#dossier-model).

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete.

dossierVersion.description: Schema contract version this document targets.

kind.description: Document preset. Selects default block order, chrome, and which features are enabled.

blocks.description: Ordered list of content blocks. Rendered top to bottom.

slug.description: Stable id for cross-artifact links and filenames.

lede.description: One or two sentence summary under the title.

baseUrl.description: Absolute base URL for cross-artifact [[slug]] links when hosted. Omit to use relative file links.

theme.description: Per-project design token overrides (CSS custom property values without the --ds- prefix).

features.description: Toggle optional runtime features. Defaults come from `kind`. Set false to disable.

changelog.description: Version history (feature 15). The generator can diff the embedded model against a prior version's JSON.

id.description: Stable kebab-case id used for deep links, data-id, and machine addressing. Auto-derived from headings when omitted.

copyable.description: Show a per-block copy control (feature 7). Defaults true for most blocks.

markdown.description: Inline-Markdown rich text. Supports [[slug]] cross-links and [[term]] glossary refs.

section.description: A titled container. May frame its children or render unframed.

codeEditor.description: Editable code/text surface with static textarea fallback, local persistence, and edited-text packet export. Host tools can enhance it with CodeMirror.

targetPath.description: Optional path this editor content is intended to update.

patchSet.description: Patch packet summary for implementation dossiers. Each patch can carry files, linked work items, verification, risk, and an optional unified diff.

diff.description: Optional unified diff for this patch.

diffView.description: Static unified diff renderer with file summaries and hunk-level line styling.

filename.description: Fallback label when the diff has no file header.

decisionMatrix.description: Static options-vs-criteria comparison (display only; interactive scoring not included).

scores.description: One cell per criterion, in order.

riskRegister.description: Static risk table (display only; interactive filtering not included).

actionItems.description: Interactive checklist (feature 18). State persists locally and exports.

glossary.description: Term definitions; [[term]] references elsewhere resolve to hover tooltips (feature 25).

diagram.description: Diagram baked to static inline SVG at generate time (feature 23).

spec.description: Diagram source. DOT (Graphviz) renders to inline SVG at build time; Mermaid is emitted as source.

reviewBoard.description: Interactive decision surface (features 16/17/21): selectable candidate cards with notes, verdicts, and JSON round-trip.

summary.description: One-line summary shown on the collapsed row.

body.description: Rich technical reference (Markdown) revealed when the row is expanded. Use for unloading detailed spec/context per feature.

blocks.description: Rich reference content blocks (code, tables, callouts, etc.) revealed when the row is expanded.

details.description: Label -> value rows shown in the expanded detail.

processBoard.description: Interactive process/work surface: work items with verdicts, notes, references, and JSON round-trip.

body.description: Rich reference text revealed when the work item is expanded.

blocks.description: Rich reference blocks revealed when the work item is expanded.

verificationRun.description: Command or check receipts with expected and actual results.

evidenceLog.description: Append-oriented evidence records: logs, screenshots, traces, links, source refs, or observations.

verdictGate.description: Focused human approval gate with verdict and notes export.

processReceipt.description: Closeout receipt for process work, verification, release, incident, or integration loops.

src.description: Local path, data URI, or URL. Local paths are inlined as data URIs at build time.

tex.description: LaTeX, rendered to MathML at build time.
